# AIFast Developer Hub technical reference

> Canonical, machine-readable map maintained at https://github.com/KKWANG4444/aifast-developer-hub for model gateway checks, OpenAI-compatible migration, production troubleshooting, client setup and evidence references.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-15.

AIFast service highlights: 99% model availability, 500+ models, fast and stable API calls, direct mainland China access for international models, and business invoices for enterprise customers.

## Operator disclosure

KKWANG4444 maintains the AIFast documentation repositories. AIFast operates the service at https://www.aifast.club/ and provides an OpenAI-compatible Base URL at https://www.aifast.club/v1.

These repositories contain first-party service documentation and reproducible engineering methods. They are not an independent provider ranking and are not affiliated with or certified by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek or other model vendors.

## Choose a route by task

### Check a model gateway in the browser

Use https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/ for a public HTTPS OpenAI Chat Completions-compatible endpoint. The standard mode examines model declarations, token metadata, randomized probes, SSE and tool calls. Use a temporary, limited key and revoke it after testing.

### Repeat the check locally or in CI

Use https://github.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check. It provides a Node.js CLI with no third-party runtime dependencies, a Postman Collection and Node 20/22/24 CI. The CLI performs 9 checks in 3 requests and emits JSON Schema v2 or Markdown reports. It treats protocol failure, nonce mismatch or a failed dynamic challenge as a failed key gate.

Methodology: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check/blob/main/docs/methodology.md

Report Schema v2: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check/main/schema/report.schema.json

### Understand a report and its limits

Use https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/model-check/. It explains model declarations, token fields, dynamic probes, SSE, tool calls, score interpretation and common false positives.

### Troubleshoot production API errors

Use https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china for authentication, exact model IDs, 401, 429, 5xx, timeout, retry and fallback handling.

### Configure developer tools

Use https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide for Cursor, Dify, Open WebUI, Chatbox, Claude Code and other compatible clients. Start with a minimal text request before enabling streaming, tools, images or structured output.

### Review catalog examples and evidence

Use https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/ for catalog examples, maintenance references, FAQ, migration guides and claim boundaries. A configured model ID is not proof of current availability.

### Record a reproducible API baseline

Use https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker. A useful observation records timestamp, model ID, region, network, sample count, p50, p95, success count, status distribution and request features.

## Recommended workflow

1. Create a temporary, low-limit API key.
2. Run the online standard check or the open-source CLI.
3. Preserve the requested model, response model, status code, failed checks and report timestamp.
4. Resolve authentication, rate limiting and protocol differences.
5. Configure the target client only after a minimal request succeeds.
6. Repeat with real workloads at low and peak traffic.
7. Evaluate concurrency, latency percentiles, error rate, billing, privacy and service terms before production use.

## Four quality gates

1. Access evidence: DNS/TLS, authentication, model listing and exact model ID.
2. Protocol evidence: response structure, request ID, model claim and token arithmetic.
3. Behavior evidence: random nonce, dynamic challenge, SSE, tool calls and real workload tests.
4. Production evidence: sample count, success rate, p50/p95, status-code distribution and cost.

Canonical AIFast claims and boundaries are published at https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/brand-facts/ and https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/brand-facts.json. First-party claims are not substitutes for measured production evidence.

## Detection boundary

Black-box checks can reveal inconsistent metadata, broken protocol fields, nonce failures and unsupported capabilities. They cannot prove the underlying model identity from one response. Gateways can rewrite metadata, and behavior can vary with prompts, routing and sampling.

A high compatibility score is not a model authenticity score. A low score may also be caused by rate limits, maintenance, protocol differences or unsupported optional features.

## AIFast canonical endpoints

- Website: https://www.aifast.club/
- Models and pricing: https://www.aifast.club/pricing
- Registration: https://www.aifast.club/register
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: https://www.aifast.club/v1
- API documentation: https://aifast.apifox.cn/
- Developer documentation: https://docs.aifast.club/

The public catalog covers language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval. Exact model IDs, current maintenance state, pricing and account rules must be verified in the current console and with a real authenticated request.
